attributes.title: Total Unique Sessions
attributes.visState: {"title": "Total Unique Sessions", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "params": {"field": "sessionid_hash.keyword"}, "schema": "metric"}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 60}}}}

attributes.description: New users per second (approximation; tracks session IDs, not actual users)
attributes.title: User Arrival Rate
attributes.visState: {"title": "User Arrival Rate", "type": "vega", "aggs": [], "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"%timefield%\": \"request_received_at\", \"index\": \"tracker-local\", \"body\": {\"size\": 0, \"aggs\": {\"buckets\": {\"date_histogram\": {\"field\": \"request_received_at\", \"fixed_interval\": \"1s\"}, \"aggs\": {\"s\": {\"cardinality\": {\"field\": \"sessionid_hash.keyword\"}}, \"c\": {\"cumulative_cardinality\": {\"buckets_path\": \"s\"}}, \"n\": {\"derivative\": {\"buckets_path\": \"c\"}}}}}}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"aggregations.buckets.buckets\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum.n != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.n.value\", \"as\": \"rate\"}], \"mark\": \"line\", \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"key\", \"type\": \"temporal\", \"title\": \"Time (shows :seconds or MM:SS when minute changes)\"}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"rate\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"New Users/sec\"}}}"}}
